paper.authors: Nicole M. Gaudelli, Alexis C. Komor, Holly A. Rees, Michael S. Packer, Ahmed H. Badran, David I. Bryson, David R. Liu

judgments.reasoning: The paper introduces adenine base editors (ABEs) that can directly convert A•T to G•C base pairs in genomic DNA without requiring double-strand DNA cleavage, directly supporting the claim regarding the mechanism and precision of base editing.

paper.title: Base editing: precision chemistry on the genome and transcriptome of living cells
paper.authors: Holly A. Rees, David R. Liu

judgments.reasoning: This foundational review by the inventors of base editing explicitly details how the technology enables precise point mutations in DNA without relying on double-strand breaks, directly contrasting its precision with traditional CRISPR-Cas9 methods.

paper.authors: Keiji Nishida, Takayuki Arazoe, Nozomu Yachie, Satomi Banno, et al.
